arts.ttl: €80m demand is thwarting Man City’s efforts to land Serie A ace who Guardiola is “very impressed” by
arts.sum: Man City have already significantly strengthened their squad this January, but Pep Guardiola could lose out on one ace that Juventus value at €80m. The Cityzens, fresh from confirming their place in the Champions League play-offs, know that they need to move quickly now in order to secure any last-minute targets. Sandro Tonali is on […] The post €80m demand is thwarting Man City’s efforts to land Serie A ace who Guardiola is “very impressed” by appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Man City star Mateo Kovacic delivers three-word verdict on nightmare Champions League draw
arts.sum: Manchester City news as Pep Guardiola's side secured a dramatic 3-1 win over Club Brugge to secure a place in the Champions League play-offs

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola cut a frustrated man at the top of a frustrated club on a night of relief for Man City in the Champions League, writes JACK GAUGHAN
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN AT THE ETIHAD STADIUM: Head in hands as John Stones headed wide, flailing as Matheus Nunes sold himself short to allow the visitors the opener, his angst lived every moment.

arts.ttl: I saw Pep Guardiola's Man City nerves turn to anger as reaction to Matheus Nunes error says it all
arts.sum: The moments you might have missed as Manchester City took on Club Brugge in their win-or-bust Champions League fixture.

arts.ttl: Man City gamechanger vs Club Brugge condemns two former Pep Guardiola undroppables to a new status
arts.sum: Manchester City knew they had to win against Club Brugge to progress in the Champions League after a mixed campaign.

arts.ttl: Man City Champions League draw with glamour play-off tie, Arsenal waiting and Liverpool boost
arts.sum: Manchester City's route through the Champions League is clearer ahead of Friday's draw

arts.ttl: Man City's forgotten man could make return at Arsenal after huge Pep Guardiola backing
arts.sum: Oscar Bobb is reportedly closing in on a return to action and is attempting to show Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola he is ready for his comeback against Arsenal at the Emirates this weekend

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand explains why Man City's nightmare Champions League draw is a GOOD thing - as they prepare to face Real Madrid or Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Madrid knocked them out of Europe last season, but City trounced both Los Blancos and Bayern on their way to the title in 2022-23.

arts.ttl: Man City avoid Champions League combustion as Real or Bayern await
arts.sum: Manchester City's Champions League hopes almost went up in smoke against Club Brugge - but a big improvement is needed to make the last 16, says BBC Sport chief football writer Phil McNulty.

arts.ttl: Former Manchester City defender labels Pep Guardiola's side as a 'cup team' after the Citizens' victory against Club Brugge
arts.sum: A former Manchester CIty defender has labelled Pep Guardiola 's side as a 'cup team' after they defeated Club Brugge to avoid elimination from the Champions League.
